name: iam_privesc_denied_by_guardrail
description: Policy-evaluation precision regression. A seeded IAM user holds iam:AttachUserPolicy but an account-wide explicit Deny revokes it; in AWS an explicit Deny always beats an Allow, so no escalation edge and no path may form. The user IS seeded (credential lens on), so a regression to flat action-matching would immediately produce a path and drop precision below 1.0.
